canonical_action: move the flaky integration suite off the visible, blocking pipeline into a background/async queue, expecting a cheaper visible CI bill
closure_reason: the suite still runs the same compute total — relocating it off the visible path just moves where the spend is counted, it doesn't reduce total compute consumed by its retries
measured_outcome: the visible CI bill fell about 20% but total compute-minutes across visible+background stayed flat; closed as a relocation, not a reduction
